name: Sunnyside Federal Savings And Loan Association Of Irvington
description_short: Sunnyside Federal Savings & Loan is a Westchester County bank offering deposit accounts, CDs, and commercial lending with FDIC insurance and mobile banking features.
description_long:
Sunnyside Federal Savings & Loan Association of Irvington is a community-focused financial institution serving the Westchester, New York area. The institution operates as a traditional savings and loan bank, providing deposit and lending services to both personal and commercial customers. Founded to serve local financial needs, Sunnyside Federal positions itself as a relationship-based alternative to larger national banks.

The bank offers a range of deposit products including savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and business checking accounts. Their current promotional offering includes a 7-month CD with a 3.60% APY at no minimum balance requirement. On the lending side, Sunnyside Federal provides commercial real estate loans designed to help businesses relocate or expand. The institution also provides digital banking capabilities, including Zelle money transfer, mobile check deposit, and business remote check deposit functionality available 24/7.

Sunnyside Federal distinguishes itself through Intrafi expanded FDIC insurance access, which allows customers to achieve multi-million-dollar FDIC coverage across accounts. The bank emphasizes streamlined commercial services with features specifically designed for business clients managing multiple accounts and high transaction volumes. Their personal service approach is evident in their direct phone line (914.591.8000) and commitment to next-business-day callbacks for after-hours inquiries.

As a regional savings and loan association, Sunnyside Federal is most suitable for small business owners and Westchester County residents seeking personalized service and specialized commercial banking solutions. The institution's focus on business customers and commercial real estate lending suggests a niche market positioning rather than comprehensive retail banking dominance. Like most regional banks, they offer competitive but not necessarily leading rates, and their service availability appears concentrated on traditional business hours with after-hours voicemail only. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: 7-month certificates of deposit (CDs) with promotional APY rates
Business checking accounts with free online banking
Commercial real estate loans for business expansion and relocation
Savings accounts with FDIC insurance protection
Zelle money transfer service for direct account-to-account transfers
Mobile check deposit for personal customers
Phone-based customer service and account support
pros: 7-month CD offering 3.60% APY with no minimum balance requirement
Intrafi expanded FDIC insurance providing access to multi-million-dollar coverage
Mobile and business remote check deposit available 24/7
Zelle integration for fast money transfers directly from accounts
Specialized commercial real estate loan programs for business relocation and expansion
Free online banking with unlimited deposits on business checking accounts
Personalized service with direct phone line and next-business-day callback commitment
cons: Limited to Westchester County market, not available nationwide
No information provided about minimum deposits, account fees, or other CD terms beyond promotional offering
Commercial real estate loan details sparse—no rates, terms, or eligibility criteria disclosed
After-hours service limited to voicemail with no stated callback timeframe beyond 'next business day'
Website lacks comprehensive product comparison, APY rates for standard savings accounts, or personal loan offerings
best_for: Small business owners in Westchester County managing commercial accounts and high transaction volumes
Customers seeking expanded FDIC insurance protection across multiple deposit accounts
Local residents preferring relationship banking with a regional institution over national banks
Business clients needing commercial real estate financing for expansion or relocation
diagnosis: Sunnyside Federal Savings & Loan is best for small business owners and Westchester County residents who value personalized service and commercial-focused banking over large national banks. Primary caveat: the institution's geographic limitations and lack of detailed product information online suggest customers must contact them directly for comprehensive rates, terms, and full product offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Westchester County bank offering deposit accounts, CDs, commercial lending, FDIC insurance, and mobile banking.
